meaning: n.棒状糖,圆锥形的帽子,研钵体的山
examples: Sugarloaf and Vermont's Sugarbush and Killington resorts were still open this weekend.
At Sugarloaf Mountain in Maine, telling others where the glades are (especially ones that are not on the maps) is considered a big faux pas.
In recent years, there has been a huge increase in visitors to the city, adding a favela tour to the traditional must-sees such as Christ the Redeemer and Sugarloaf Mountain.
